name: Helicopter Rescue Games 3d
description: Helicopter Rescue Games 3D is an exciting rescue simulation game where you play as a skilled helicopter pilot. The game features 1 main rescue mode with 10 challenging levels. In each level, you will complete different rescue missions such as saving injured people, transporting passengers, and handling emergency situations in mountains and city environments. Game Features: - 1 Rescue Mode with 05 unique levels - Different rescue missions and challenges - Realistic helicopter controls (joystick + slider) - Speed control system (1x / 2x) - Fuel management system - Smooth and immersive 3D graphics
instructions: Use the on-screen joystick to control the helicopter movement forward backward left right Use the slider to control altitude move up to fly higher and down to descend Use the 1x 2x button to adjust helicopter speed Monitor the fuel gauge
